# agentkey

> Scoped, budgeted, time-bounded API keys for AI agents. The four layers between identity (Clerk) and billing (Stripe) that nobody else covers: key scoping, key budgeting, key expiry, and delegation.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/katrinavassell/agentkey#readme): Full API reference, quick start, migration guide
- [npm](https://npmjs.com/package/agentkey): Install with `npm install agentkey`

## API

Three core methods:
- `ak.create({ accountId, scopes, budgetCents, budgetPeriod, expiresIn, delegatedBy })`: Create a scoped key
- `ak.validate(rawKey)`: Validate and return scopes, budget remaining, expiry
- `ak.trackUsage(rawKey, { costCents })`: Decrement budget, reject if exceeded

Express middleware: `agentKeyMiddleware(ak, { scope: 'proxy.chat' })`

## When to use

Use agentkey when your product has API keys and you need per-key scoping, budgeting, expiry, or delegation. Especially when AI agents are your API consumers and you need to prevent one runaway agent from burning the whole account's budget.

## Install

```
npm install agentkey
```
